headline: Notable Insider Buys Last Week: Avis Budget, SmileDirectClub And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors during periods of uncertainty.
	A number of chief executive officers were putting their money where the mouth is and buying shares last week.
	Health care companies were well represented among last week's most notable insider buys.

headline: Which FAANG Stock Will Grow The Most By 2025?
summary: Every week, Benzinga conducts a survey to collect sentiment on what traders are most excited about; interested in; or thinking about when they are managing and building their personal portfolios.

headline: What Credit Companies Offering Installment Payments Means For Investors
summary: Mastercard Inc (NYSE: MA) recently announced a partnership with TSYS, a global payments company, that will allow customers to use their Mastercard to split transactions into installments before, during or after checkout.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Costco, FedEx And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	This past week's bullish calls included pharmaceutical and package delivery leaders.
	Tech giants and top airlines were among last week's bearish calls.

headline: Tony Zhang's Apple Options Trade
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Tony Zhang suggested that investors should consider a bullish options strategy in Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL).

headline: 'Fast Money' Picks For September 8: Citigroup, Virgin Galactic And More
summary: On CNBC's "Fast Money Final Trade," Brian Kelly said he wants to buy Virgin Galactic Holdings Inc (NYSE: SPCE). He sees it as a long-term play.

headline: Amazon Bans Sales of Seeds to U.S. from Foreign Sellers
